response.justification: Aisha brings exceptional depth with 20+ years in software engineering and 9+ in senior roles, directly addressing a critical requirement through current AI-agent infrastructure expertise at re:cinq. Strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation across multiple roles provides solid core-stack competency. However, the role emphasizes Nest.js specifically, which isn't explicitly documented—while Node.js and GraphQL experience is substantial, Nest.js architectural patterns may require ramp-up. React exposure exists but is limited to a single recent role; this full-stack position requires balanced frontend/backend strength. Security/auth work isn't evidenced, though not disqualifying for a technically strong generalist.
